title: Kevin's Air Quality Services — Professional Duct Cleaning & Mold Remediation
seo_title: Kevin's Air Quality Services — Duct Cleaning & Mold Remediation | DFW
seo_description: Professional duct cleaning, mold remediation, UV light installation, and dryer vent cleaning. Free inspections. Before & after documentation. Serving Dallas-Fort Worth.

branding.name: Kevin's Air Quality Services
branding.description: Professional duct cleaning, mold remediation, and indoor air quality solutions for DFW homes and businesses.

props.title: Breathe Clean. Live Healthy.
props.subtitle: Professional mold remediation, UV light installation, and duct cleaning for homes and businesses across Dallas-Fort Worth. Free inspections with before & after documentation.

items.title: Mold Remediation
items.description: We open your HVAC plenum and eliminate mold caused by condensation buildup. EPA-registered disinfectant kills existing mold, then we apply a professional mold blocker coating that seals the surface. Dramatic before and after results — documented with photos.

items.title: UV Light Installation
items.description: Hospital-grade UV lights installed inside your HVAC system make it physically impossible for mold to regrow. Your air is continuously purified as it circulates through your home — 24/7 protection without chemicals.

items.title: Dryer Vent Cleaning
items.description: Clogged dryer vents are the #1 cause of residential fires. We thoroughly clean your entire dryer exhaust line — improving energy efficiency, reducing dry times, and eliminating a serious fire hazard.

items.title: Full Duct Cleaning
items.description: Complete air duct system cleaning using professional roto brush and negative air technology. We remove years of accumulated dust, debris, and allergens while keeping your home spotless during the process.

props.label: How It Works
props.heading: Simple. Transparent. Proven.
props.subheading: From first call to clean air — we handle everything.

steps.title: Free Inspection
steps.description: We examine your HVAC system and show you exactly what's happening inside your ducts and plenum — with photos.

steps.title: Custom Treatment Plan
steps.description: Based on what we find, we recommend the right combination of cleaning, disinfection, and prevention for your home.

steps.title: Professional Treatment
steps.description: EPA-registered disinfectants. Professional-grade mold blocker. Hospital-grade UV lights. We use the best because your family deserves it.

steps.title: Before & After Proof
steps.description: We document everything with photos so you can see exactly what we did. Your air quality improvement — verified and visible.
steps.callout: See the difference with your own eyes.

props.heading: Why DFW Trusts Us
props.subheading: Results you can see. Air you can trust.

testimonials.quote: Kevin showed me photos of the mold growing inside my AC system — I had no idea. After the cleaning and UV light installation, the air in our house feels completely different. My allergies have improved significantly.
testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.title: Dallas, TX

testimonials.quote: Fast, professional, and honest. He showed me the before and after photos and the difference was night and day. The UV light gives me peace of mind that the mold won't come back.
testimonials.name: Homeowner
testimonials.title: Fort Worth, TX
